name: TransMission
summary: Built for larger shipments and pallets with TransMission. Labels and tracking in the same flow as your parcels.
tagline: Freight and pallet shipments across Europe.
about: TransMission is a Dutch carrier focused on freight and pallet shipments, both within the Netherlands and across Europe. Through a European network of regional carriers, TransMission excels at shipments that a regular parcel service can't handle. Think large boxes, pallets and shipments with agreed delivery times.

faqs.q: Does TransMission also work for regular parcel shipments?
faqs.a: TransMission focuses mainly on freight and pallet shipments. For regular parcels you'll usually use a carrier like PostNL, DPD or GLS in ShopLinkr. With a shipping rule you can easily pick a different carrier per order type.
